title: Prime Video Has The Only Comic-Accurate Superhero TV Show
summary: Great superhero shows aren't hard to find these days, but despite their unquestionable quality, Prime Video has the only truly comic-accurate series.
imageAlt: Prime Video Has The Only Comic-Accurate Superhero TV Show

fullArticle:
Superhero media is hard to avoid these days, as it is prominent on TV, the big screen, and even in the world of video games. The quality has certainly fluctuated over the years, but while these larger-than-life characters have had mixed success in theaters recently, superhero projects are still thriving on TV.

These kinds of shows experienced a big boom in the 1960s and became massive in the 90s, maintaining their relevance for over three decades. However, while there has been an abundance of fantastic series over the years that were heavily inspired by comic books, Prime Video's Invincible is the most comic-accurate superhero show, and it continues to shine.
